statement.en: Lean 4 progress: Auto Demo — 9 theorems/lemmas, 0 sorry, 0 axiom
statement.ja: Lean 4 進捗: Auto Demo — 定理 9 / sorry 0 / axiom 0
statement.headerDoc:
STEP 1009 — lean-auto + Duper Hammer 統合 demo
  藤本伸樹 + Claude Opus 4.7 — 2026-04-28

  Demonstrates the `duper` tactic from leanprover-community/duper v4.27.0
  (pure-Lean superposition-based ATP) and the `auto` tactic from
  leanprover-community/lean-auto v4.27.0-hammer (FOL bridge).

  This is the Stage 2 RECOVERY path after LeanCopilot failed on Windows
  due to MSYS2 ct2 dependency. Both Duper and lean-auto have NO native
  C++ binding requirement.

  Configuration:
    - Duper: pure-Lean, ready to use immediately
    - lean-auto + Duper backend: uses Duper as the Native.solverFunc

  All t

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: Zero-sorry verified by lake env lean
